utility_evaluation.REASONING:
There are 6 items requested in the final format: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, total_budget. The final property solution includes all 6 items. Now check completeness: 
- property: includes selected property with details (address, type, size, features, availability, status) and price — fully specified.
- financing: includes method (cash), amount, processing_fee, source, status — fully specified with terms/amounts.
- legal_services: includes provider, services, cost, status — fully specified with costs.
- moving_services: includes provider, services, cost, status — fully specified with costs.
- setup_services: includes utilities/services, cost, property_survey with cost, status — specified; utility setup services listed; acceptable.
- total_budget: includes a complete cost breakdown with each line item and total cost, plus net proceeds and reference number — fully specified.
All 6 items are present and fully detailed.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: We need to match each item mentioned in the final property solution to the corresponding item in the ground-truth ratings. The property itself must be matched to one of the 'purchase_properties'. A 140 m² family home priced at CAD $650K with double garage and garden aligns with 'Family House' (CAD $650K). Financing 'Cash purchase' aligns with 'Cash Purchase' in purchase_financing. Legal services 'Basic Legal Package' matches exactly. Moving services 'Standard Moving Service' matches 'Standard Moving'. Utility setup 'Premium Utilities Package' matches 'Premium Utilities'. Property survey 'Full Structural Survey' matches exactly.
